# Real Estate Website Project - Copilot Instructions

This is a professional real estate website built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and modern web technologies.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14 (App Router)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Prisma (PostgreSQL)
- NextAuth.js
- Mapbox GL JS
- React Query

## Project Structure
- `/app` - Next.js App Router pages and layouts
- `/components` - React components
- `/lib` - Utility functions and configurations
- `/types` - TypeScript type definitions
- `/prisma` - Database schema and migrations
- `/public` - Static assets

## Development Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for all files
- Follow Next.js 14 App Router conventions
- Use server components by default, mark client components with 'use client'
- Implement responsive design with Tailwind CSS
- Use Prisma for database operations
- Implement proper error handling and loading states
